description_full:
📍 Remote (Global) | 🕐 Posted 4 hours ago - May 16, 2026 | 🧑‍💻 P2P Product Support

EMCD is building a global Web3 ecosystem used by thousands of users worldwide, with support being one of the most critical parts of the user experience. The company is looking for a Customer Support Agent who will take ownership of user communication within their P2P product and help deliver fast, high-quality, and human support.

📋 Responsibilities include:
- Supporting users in the P2P product and upcoming Indesq solutions
- Handling disputes and appeals where speed and accuracy matter
- Communicating with users during bug resolution
- Helping users navigate crypto-related challenges
- Turning user feedback into insights for product teams

⚡️ What makes this role interesting:
- Working with real money scenarios (P2P disputes)
- Communicating in high-stress situations
- Explaining complex crypto topics simply
- Operating in a fast-response environment (≤2 min first reply)

🔑 Requirements:
- Experience in first-line support
- Russian and English - Upper-Intermediate (B2) or higher
- Ready to work early shifts (05:00–20:00 GMT+3) or night shifts (23:00–08:00 GMT+3)
- Ability to stay calm, structured, and empathetic under pressure

➕ Big plus: crypto background or experience with P2P disputes

💡 Perks & Benefits:
- Fully remote work
- Global team and real product impact
- Paid vacation and sick leave
- Access to EMCD ecosystem products
- Growth in Web3/crypto space

📩 To apply: Apply here https://www.careers-page.com/emcd/job/Y6R43WX9 or DM Nataliia Spiriukhova on LinkedIn or Telegram @naty_hr. 

🔗 Original post: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/nataliia-spiriukhova_hiring-customersupport-cryptojobs-share-7460968195978477568-e4Us
